    (and (and APU_HAS_LDAP APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY)

    (and (and APU_HAS_LDAP APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY)

model:
(define-fun __STRICT_ANSI__ () Bool
  true)
(define-fun APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY () Bool
  true)
(define-fun __USE_EXTERN_INLINES () Bool
  true)
(define-fun __need___FILE () Bool
  false)
(define-fun APU_HAS_LDAP () Bool
  true)
reasoning: rmm_lock is read without initialization at L14 — the VBDB-known bug (// ERROR at L14). Pulse duplicate of the CSA alarm. PC: the 4 OR clauses cover all combinations of __need___FILE, __STRICT_ANSI__, and __USE_EXTERN_INLINES, which cancel to true. PC simplifies to APU_HAS_LDAP AND APR_HAS_SHARED_MEMORY, correctly constrained.
